docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,500.00 FILED BY MURPHY JOYCE AS TO DEFENDANT LOPEZ JOSE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-11-1991 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 07
POS INVALID, NO RECORD OF DATE OF SERVICE ON JOSE LOPEZ.
